query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, p.onboarding_completed 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN userProfiles p ON u.id = p.user_id 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user uKNVFKSibJwkJmH.a22a0ae33adf --database 8mnpBTn4hjcJVry2wKetBn --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, p.onboarding_completed

LEFT JOIN userProfiles p ON u.id = p.user_id
